div.h1: Linked SQE Chains — Atomic Multi-Step Operations
div.h2: Linux io_uring Kernel Submission Logic (Internal Implementation)

ul.li: Chain executes sequentially on the same worker context.
If entry N fails, entries N+1...M are aborted.
Aborted entries return res = -ECANCELED to userspace.

ol.li: Maximum link depth: Kernel dependent (usually limited).
IOSQE_IO_DRAIN on a link head waits for previous reqs.
